config.script:
try:
		action = self.view.params.value
		rowData = self.view.params.rowData
		areaId  = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
		lineId = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
		workstationId = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
		userId = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		
		shiftdetails = str(Project_VECV.WashingMachine.Shift.getShiftName(lineId))
		shiftdetails = shiftdetails.split('-')
		if len(shiftdetails) == 0:
			state = "success"
			message = 'Shift Not Configured'
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
		else:
			shiftId = shiftdetails[1]
			shiftCode = shiftdetails[0]
		
			bomId = rowData['m_BOM_id']
			M_BOMNumber = rowData['M_BOMNumber']
			orderNumber = rowData['order_number']
			serialNumber= rowData['serial_number']
			orderStatusId = 0
			classificationcount = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/getClassificationCount",{"BOM":bomId})
			if int(classificationcount) > 0:
			
				
		#		shiftId = 1
				if int(action) == 1:
					eventId = 3
					message = 'Order Started'
					orderStatusId = 6
					stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
					state='Info'
					try:
						userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
						ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
						data="orderNumber Started %s "%str(orderNumber)
						Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
					except:
						pass
				else:
					eventId = 5
					message = 'Order Completed'
					try:
						stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
						state='Info'
						userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
						ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
						data="Serial Generated %s for ordernumber %s "%(str(serialNumber),str(orderNumber))
						Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
					except:
						pass
					
				params = {'Area_Id':areaId,'Line_Id':lineId,'WorkStation_Id':workstationId,'Event_Id':eventId,'BOM_Id':bomId,'Status_Id':orderStatusId,'OperatorID':userId,'CreatedBy':userId,'ShiftId':shiftId,'OrderNumber':orderNumber,'M_BOMNumber':M_BOMNumber,'serialNumber':serialNumber}	
				result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/addUpdateWashingMachine",params)
				if result[0]['result'] == '1':
					result=str(result)
					state = "success"
					Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
					system.perspective.sendMessage("WashineMachineTableRefresh", scope = "page")
					if eventId == 5:
						try:
							params = {'BomId':bomId}	
							result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/getClassficationData",params)
							GearRatio=result[0][0]
							
							
							system.perspective.sendMessage("OrderTableRefresh", scope = "session")
							project=system.util.getProjectName()
							messageHandler = "OrderRefreshOrderMgmt"
							OrderLock = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Order/OrderLock")[0].value
							system.perspective.print("OrderLock in startComplete button %s"%OrderLock)
							if OrderLock == False:
								system.util.sendMessage(project, messageHandler, scope="S")
							### get printer details
							
							pyres=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/GetPrinterDetails",{'WorkStation':self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId})
							system.perspective.print("printerquery in startComplete button %s"%pyres)
							for row in pyres:
								IP = row["IPAddress"]
								port = row["Port"]
							try:
								try:
									LineName=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
									system.perspective.print("LineName at L81 ---->%s"%LineName)
									if LineName.upper()=='LD DIFF CARRIER SUB ASSY LINE A'.upper():
										Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrint(serialNumber,GearRatio,shiftCode,IP,port,3)
										params={'isDHBOM':1,'AreaId':areaId}
										system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getProductionOrders_Sequenced_WM",params)
									elif LineName.upper()=='TITAN MAIN LINE'.upper():
										Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrint(serialNumber,GearRatio,shiftCode,IP,port,2)
										params={'isDHBOM':0,'AreaId':areaId}
										system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getProductionOrders_Sequenced_WM",params)
									elif LineName.upper()=='HUB SUB ASSY LINE'.upper():
										Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrint(serialNumber,GearRatio,shiftCode,IP,port,4)
										params={'isDHBOM':0,'AreaId':areaId}
										system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getProductionOrders_Sequenced_WM",params)
									elif LineName.upper()=='EV CARRIER SUB-ASSEMBLY'.upper():
										Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrint(serialNumber,GearRatio,shiftCode,IP,port,3)
										params={'isDHBOM':1,'AreaId':areaId}
										system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getProductionOrders_Sequenced_WM",params)
									else:
										Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrint(serialNumber,GearRatio,shiftCode,IP,port,1)
								except:
									system.perspective.print("error")
#								Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrint(serialNumber,GearRatio,shiftCode,IP,port)
								data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getPartNumber",{"MST_WorkStation_Id":self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId,"M_BOM_Id":bomId})
								partNumber = ''
								for dt in data:    
									partNumber = dt['M_MaterialNumber']
								if partNumber != '':
									gearRatio = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/getGearRatio",{"SerialNumber":serialNumber})
									try:
										system.perspective.print("gearRatio "+gearRatio)
										system.perspective.print("partNumber "+partNumber)
									except:
										pass
									##### Quality Gate4 print Quantity 1
									WorkStationName='LAQG04'
									params = {"dropdowntype":1,"workStationName":WorkStationName}
									queryPath = 'Project_VECV/LeakTest/getAllIDs'
									dataset = system.db.runNamedQuery(queryPath,params)
									for data in dataset:
										LQG_WorkStation_Id=data['MST_WorkStation_Id']
									res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/GetPrinterDetails",{'WorkStation':LQG_WorkStation_Id})
									pyres=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(res)
									for row in pyres:
										LQIP = row["IPAddress"]
										LQport = row["Port"]
									Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getDHPrintExtra(serialNumber,LQIP,LQport,partNumber,GearRatio)
									##### Quality Gate5 print Quantity 1
#									WorkStationName='LAQG05'
#									params = {"dropdowntype":1,"workStationName":WorkStationName}
#									queryPath = 'Project_VECV/LeakTest/getAllIDs'
#									dataset = system.db.runNamedQuery(queryPath,params)
#									for data in dataset:
#										LQG_WorkStation_Id=data['MST_WorkStation_Id']
#									res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/GetPrinterDetails",{'WorkStation':LQG_WorkStation_Id})
#									pyres=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(res)
#									for row in pyres:
#										LQIP = row["IPAddress"]
#										LQport = row["Port"]
#									Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getDHPrint(serialNumber,LQIP,LQport,partNumber,gearRatio)
									try:
										stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
										state='Info'
										userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
										ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
										data="print for %s completed"%(str(serialNumber))
										
										Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
									except:
										pass
							except:
								message = 'Printer Failed.'
								state = "warning"
								Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
								try:
									stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
									state='Error'
									userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
									ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
									data="print Failed for %s"%(str(serialNumber))
									Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
								except:
									pass			
							
							### Call message handler to refresh data on Hub and Main line washing machine
							if 'LAH20' in (self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation).upper():
								project=system.util.getProjectName()
								messageHandler = "LAWMTableRefresh"
								system.util.sendMessage(project, messageHandler, scope="S")
						except:
							screenName ='StartButton print '   
							filePath=str('Project_VECV/Templates/Order/WashingMachine')  
							errorFunction = str('Event:onAction  -> StartCompleteButton')  
							errorType=str('Application')  
							errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
							description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
							lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
							Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
					
				else:
					message = 'failed'
					state = "warning"
					Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
				system.perspective.sendMessage("WashineMachineTableRefresh", scope = "page")
				project=system.util.getProjectName()
				messageHandler = "OrderRefresh"
				system.util.sendMessage(project, messageHandler, scope="S")
			else:
				message = 'No Classification Data for This BOM'
				state = "warning"
				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")        
								
		#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='StartButton'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Templates/Order/WashingMachine/StartCompleteButton')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onAction  -> StartCompleteButton')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
